'''gatovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aver|aver]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aver|aver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gatovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæteveth|gæteveth]] || [[word:gætevej|gætevej]] || [[word:gætevesh|gætevesh]] || [[word:gæteve|gæteve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gatotovoth|gatotovoth]] || [[word:gatotovoj|gatotovoj]] || [[word:gatotovosh|gatotovosh]] || [[word:gatotovo|gatotovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gatovoth|gatovoth]] || [[word:gatovoj|gatovoj]] || [[word:gatovosh|gatovosh]] || [[word:gatovo|gatovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gatofvoth|gatofvoth]] || [[word:gatofvoj|gatofvoj]] || [[word:gatofvosh|gatofvosh]] || [[word:gatofvof|gatofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gatovotho|gatovotho]] || [[word:gatovojo|gatovojo]] || [[word:gatovosho|gatovosho]] || [[word:gatovoko|gatovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gatovoth|gatovoth]] || [[word:gatovoj|gatovoj]] || [[word:gatovosh|gatovosh]] || [[word:gatovo|gatovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gatovothol|gatovothol]] || [[word:gatovojol|gatovojol]] || [[word:gatovoshol|gatovoshol]] || [[word:gatovokol|gatovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gatovothotho|gatovothotho]] || [[word:gatovojojo|gatovojojo]] || [[word:gatovoshosho|gatovoshosho]] || [[word:gatovoko|gatovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gatovothon|gatovothon]] || [[word:gatovojon|gatovojon]] || [[word:gatovoshon|gatovoshon]] || [[word:gatovokon|gatovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gatovothoro|gatovothoro]] || [[word:gatovojoro|gatovojoro]] || [[word:gatovoshoro|gatovoshoro]] || [[word:gatovokoro|gatovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
